Our Foundation

About Sharell & Shalom Kids Centre

We provide a nurturing preschool environment in Beitbridge, focused on early childhood development through play, creativity, digital learning and guided learning. Every child is known, valued and celebrated here.

🌟

Our Vision

Positive, caring relationships based on trust and respect are at the heart of our philosophy — a community where children feel safe, valued and inspired every day.

🎯

Our Mission

To provide high-quality education and childcare in a safe, respectful and inclusive environment that builds the foundation for life-long learning.

💛

Our Promise

Every child who walks through our doors is treated with warmth, patience and respect. We partner closely with families to ensure each child thrives.

What We Offer

A Place Your Child Will Love

Our programmes are designed to spark curiosity, build confidence and develop the whole child.

Find Us

Our Location in Beitbridge

📍 Approx. 1.5–2 km from Beitbridge Town Centre

📌 Address

🏠

House 14910
New Medium Commercial Area
Beitbridge, Matabeleland South, Zimbabwe

📏

Approximately 1.5–2 km south-east of Beitbridge Town Centre in the New Medium Commercial Area.

🏙️

Near the Beitbridge–Musina border corridor, easily accessible from all parts of town.

💡

Ask locals for "Sharell and Shalom Kids Centre" — we are well known!
